factors.rationale: The product is visible but competes with other elements in the image.
The setting hints at lifestyle but does not clearly show a use case.
The image communicates a broad positive claim without a specific benefit.
The layout is organized, making the eye path clear.
The product is clear, but material quality is not emphasized.
No clear trust signal is visible in the image.
The image has strong contrast and is readable.
The image is polished but lacks clear campaign context.
